title: Field
description: A single form field as defined inside a 123FormBuilder form schema.

id.description: Unique field identifier within the form.

label.description: Human-readable label rendered to the respondent.

type.description: Field type. Examples: ShortText, LongText, Email, Number, SingleChoice, MultipleChoice, FileUpload, Signature, Rating, Payment, HTML.

required.description: Whether the respondent must answer this field before submitting.

default_value.description: Default value pre-filled when the form is loaded.

options.description: Choice list for SingleChoice, MultipleChoice, and Dropdown field types.
